about.title: About CarsAuto
about.intro: CarsAuto is the leading multilingual vehicle marketplace connecting buyers, sellers, and dealers across Iraq, Kurdistan, and the UAE.
about.missionBody: We're building the most trusted place to buy and sell cars, motorcycles, spare parts, and vehicle services in the region — with verified listings, transparent pricing, and tools that make the process safer for everyone involved.
offerItems: A verified marketplace for cars, motorcycles, spare parts, and vehicle accessories
A dedicated dealer portal with lead management, analytics, and subscription plans
Buyer protection tools including seller verification and fraud monitoring
AI-assisted listing tools, including smart pricing guidance and photo enhancement
about.marketsBody: CarsAuto currently serves Baghdad, Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, Duhok, Kirkuk, and Basra in Iraq and Kurdistan, along with Dubai and Sharjah in the UAE.
about.contactCta: Have a question or partnership inquiry? We'd love to hear from you.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We're here to help with anything from account questions to dealer partnerships.
contact.dealersBody: Interested in listing your dealership on CarsAuto? Get started through our dealer registration page.
contact.trustBody: If you've encountered a suspicious listing, a fraudulent seller, or a safety concern, please report it so our trust & safety team can review it.
contact.responseNote: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 1–2 business days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how CarsAuto collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our marketplace.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, phone number, email address, and listing details, as well as information collected automatically, such as device data and usage patterns, to operate and improve the marketplace.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to operate the marketplace, connect buyers and sellers, process payments and subscriptions, detect and prevent fraud, and communicate important updates about your account or listings.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies & Tracking
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember your preferences (such as language and currency), and understand how the marketplace is used so we can improve it. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: 4. How We Share Information
sections.body: We share information with dealers or sellers you contact directly, with service providers who help us operate the platform (such as payment processors), and with authorities where required by law. We do not sell your personal information to advertisers.

sections.heading: 5. Data Security
sections.body: We use industry-standard safeguards to protect your information, including encrypted connections and access controls. No system is perfectly secure, and we encourage you to use a strong, unique password.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.body: You can access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information at any time through your account settings, or by contacting us directly.

sections.heading: 7. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, and resolve disputes.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.body: CarsAuto is not intended for use by anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect information from minors.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. We'll notify you of significant changes through the platform or by email.

privacy.cookiesAnchorBody: See Section 3 above for details on how we use cookies. Essential cookies (required for login and core functionality) cannot be disabled. Optional analytics cookies can be managed through your browser settings.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about this policy? Reach us at

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the CarsAuto marketplace. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: 1. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a legally binding contract to use CarsAuto.

sections.heading: 2. Your Account
sections.body: You're responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.heading: 3. Listings & Content
sections.body: Sellers are responsible for the accuracy of their listings, including vehicle condition, pricing, and photos. Listings must not be fraudulent, misleading, or for items you don't have the right to sell.

sections.heading: 4. Prohibited Conduct
sections.body: You may not use CarsAuto to post stolen or misrepresented vehicles, harass other users, manipulate rankings or reviews, or attempt to circumvent our fraud detection systems.

sections.heading: 5. Fees & Subscriptions
sections.body: Certain features, including dealer subscriptions and premium/featured listings, require payment. Fees are disclosed before purchase and are generally non-refundable except as required by law.

sections.heading: 6. Buyer & Seller Responsibility
sections.body: CarsAuto is a marketplace that connects buyers and sellers — we are not a party to transactions between them. Buyers are responsible for inspecting vehicles before purchase; sellers are responsible for honoring listed terms.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: CarsAuto provides the platform "as is" and is not liable for disputes, losses, or damages arising from transactions between users, to the maximum extent permitted by law.

sections.heading: 8. Suspension & Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in fraud, or pose a risk to other users, at our discretion.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdictions in which CarsAuto operates, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of CarsAuto after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
